# Third-party code

- `superzazu/`: Z80 CPU core by Nicolas Allemand, MIT licensed, vendored from
  <https://github.com/superzazu/z80>. See `superzazu/LICENSE` and
  `superzazu/VENDORED.txt`.
- `ymfm/`: Yamaha FM/SSG/ADPCM cores by Aaron Giles, BSD-3-Clause licensed,
  vendored from the ares reference tree's `thirdparty/ymfm` copy. See
  `ymfm/LICENSE` and `ymfm/VENDORED.txt`.
